text: Being in this modern, bright space, I feel the pull of innovation and curiosity. The glass walls and interactive exhibition panels elicit a sense of transparency and discovery. Standing before the R+D display, I am struck by humanity’s quest to understand and shape the world, our relentless drive to question, create, and connect. I am both observer and participant in this ongoing dialogue of progress, feeling a quiet awe at the blend of design and intellect that surrounds me.
